facts.claim: Haugesund ( ) is a town in Haugesund Municipality in Rogaland county, Norway.
The town is located along the Karmsundet strait on the southwest coast of Norway.

Haugesund[4] ([ˈhæʉɡəsʉn] ⓘ) is a town[1] in Haugesund Municipality in Rogaland county, Norway. The town is located along the Karmsundet strait on the southwest coast of Norway. The town lies about 60 kilometres (37 mi) north of the city of Stavanger and about 120 kilometres (75 mi) south of the city of Bergen.[5][6]
